name: farmers-connect-apk
description: Farmers Connect Android APK — wraps the PWA with native camera, offline support, and push notifications

scripts.build:debug: npm run copy && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && node scripts/copy-apk.js debug
scripts.build:release: npm run copy && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && node scripts/copy-apk.js release
